strengths: ~16 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Demonstrated builder/founder mindset via GISCollective open-source platform and entrepreneurial side projects
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No evidence of Principal/Director-level IC scope: no staff-plus org influence, strategy artifacts, or executive advisory work
AI experience is shallow and very recent (~1 year on agent tooling); no ML/AI products, research, or platforms shipped at scale
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) and no demonstrated work advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product direction

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Principal/Director-level IC influence and external thought leadership
Breadth of engineering experience and builder track record

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud-platform strategy chops, and the ability to advise strategic customers — competencies for which the résumé shows little concrete evidence. AI work is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling at re:cinq with no shipped AI products, publications, or platform leadership. Cloud experience is largely application-level (AWS CDK at Optilyz) rather than platform strategy, and there are no signals of Principal-level scope such as cross-org technical direction, keynote-level talks, or executive customer advisory. The candidate is a solid senior/staff engineer with genuine builder breadth and an open-source platform (GISCollective), but the evidence does not support a Principal AI Strategy hire.
